Undecided.

This concept presents a genuinely novel approach to strategy gaming, shifting the focus from overt conflict to the intricate manipulation of perception and information. The premise of navigating a post-conflict society through narrative control and ethical complexities holds significant appeal, promising deep strategic engagement beyond conventional warfare simulations. However, the ultimate success of such a product hinges entirely on the depth of its simulation mechanics and the cleverness of its AI-driven narrative systems. Without assurance that these elements are robustly implemented, the risk of repetitive or shallow gameplay is a notable concern. The execution will determine its value.
